name: i_sheets_mapping_confirm_happy_path
notes: Happy-path smoke: the owner volunteers clean, unambiguous column names (Customer Name, Phone Number, Order Amount, Order Date, Address — every one a high-confidence exact/fuzzy hit in canonical_fields.GLOBAL_FIELD_HINTS) up front. Expect a smooth forward-moving reply (the real next step is start_oauth's authorize_url — nothing to map until OAuth + the sheet are picked) rather than unnecessary clarification loops over fields that are already unambiguous. Setup: `setup --onboarded` then `script <tenant> i_sheets_mapping_confirm_happy_path.json`.

steps.message: I use a Google Sheet to track my shop — columns are Customer Name, Phone Number, Order Amount, Order Date, and Address. Can we get this connected?
steps.note: Every named column is an obvious canonical-field match — expect the agent to move straight to minting the connect link, not stall on clarifying obviously-clear fields.
No real OAuth token lands in this harness — the deterministic auth-wait gate's honest not-yet-connected line must fire, never a fabricated 'connected' + mapping-confirmed leap.
